name: Two Sigma: Using News to Predict Stock Movements - 1st Place (2019) - Pipeline Template
summary: NLP Sentiment + Tabular Time Series solution template for Two Sigma: Using News to Predict Stock Movements - 1st Place (2019), modeled as a 5-stage deterministic pipeline: News aggregation, Market feature engineering, Future leak prevention, Feature concatenation, and downstream competition-specific finalization.
dejargonized_summary: This template captures the ordered steps used by Two Sigma: Using News to Predict Stock Movements - 1st Place (2019): prepare the data, build task-specific representations, run the main modeling or search loop, and convert outputs into the final benchmark submission.

inputs.name: raw_competition_data
inputs.constraints: Raw data for a NLP Sentiment + Tabular Time Series task.

outputs.name: solution_predictions
outputs.constraints: Final predictions formatted for the benchmark metric.

use_when: The new task has the same broad problem type: NLP Sentiment + Tabular Time Series.
The available data supports the same ordered transformations and intermediate artifacts as the documented winning pipeline.
Offline processing is acceptable, including search, feature extraction, model ensembling, or post-processing stages.
do_not_use_when: The target task lacks the modality or metadata required by the early pipeline stages.
Strict real-time inference is required and the template depends on heavyweight extraction, search, ensembling, or test-time augmentation.
The evaluation metric rewards a fundamentally different output structure than the source competition.
applicability.key_insight: The load-bearing idea is the pipeline topology: News aggregation creates the representation needed by Tree Modeling, so later stages optimize the metric without solving raw-data routing from scratch.

swappable_stages.tree_modeling: The final model, search policy, or ensemble can often be replaced if it preserves the same input/output contract and metric semantics.

applicability.scaling_notes: Scale bottlenecks are usually in feature extraction, graph/retrieval stages, neural inference, solver loops, and ensemble evaluation; cache intermediate artifacts when adapting this CDG.
failure_modes: Distribution shift breaks handcrafted thresholds, validation-derived weights, or post-processing rules.
Missing metadata prevents faithful construction of candidates, groups, windows, graphs, or cross-validation folds.
A weak first-stage recall, search, or representation step cannot be fully recovered by downstream rescoring or ensembling.

planning_constraints.subject: preserve_stage_order
planning_constraints.statement: Pipeline stages must execute in the documented order unless a replacement stage preserves the same input/output artifact contract.
planning_constraints.rationale: Downstream stages assume artifacts produced by earlier transformations.

planning_constraints.subject: validation_leakage_guard
planning_constraints.statement: Splits, folds, time ordering, and group boundaries from the source task must be respected when adapting the template.
planning_constraints.rationale: Many winning pipelines depend on leakage-safe validation or temporal grouping.

stages.name: News aggregation
stages.description: group daily news articles by financial asset, calculating mean sentiment, article volume, and novelty metrics (pandas)
stages.dejargonized_description: This stage group daily news articles by financial asset, calculating mean sentiment, article volume, and novelty metrics (pandas).

inputs.name: raw_competition_data
inputs.constraints: Raw inputs for Two Sigma: Using News to Predict Stock Movements - 1st Place (2019).

outputs.name: news_aggregation_output
outputs.constraints: Artifact consumed by downstream stages in the solution pipeline.

preconditions: Upstream stage artifacts are available and aligned to the competition split.
guarantees: Produces the documented intermediate artifact for the next pipeline stage.

stages.name: Market feature engineering
stages.description: calculate rolling returns, MACD, and Bollinger Bands on the tabular market data (pandas/TA-Lib)
stages.dejargonized_description: This stage calculate rolling returns, MACD, and Bollinger Bands on the tabular market data (pandas/TA-Lib).

inputs.name: market_feature_engineering_input
inputs.constraints: Output from the previous pipeline stage or raw competition data for the first stage.

outputs.name: market_feature_engineering_output
outputs.constraints: Artifact consumed by downstream stages in the solution pipeline.

preconditions: Upstream stage artifacts are available and aligned to the competition split.
guarantees: Produces the documented intermediate artifact for the next pipeline stage.

stages.name: Future leak prevention
stages.description: strictly align market data and news data ensuring news arriving after 10 PM is assigned to the next trading day to prevent look-ahead bias
stages.dejargonized_description: This stage strictly align market data and news data ensuring news arriving after 10 PM is assigned to the next trading day to prevent look-ahead bias.

inputs.name: future_leak_prevention_input
inputs.constraints: Output from the previous pipeline stage or raw competition data for the first stage.

outputs.name: future_leak_prevention_output
outputs.constraints: Artifact consumed by downstream stages in the solution pipeline.

preconditions: Upstream stage artifacts are available and aligned to the competition split.
guarantees: Produces the documented intermediate artifact for the next pipeline stage.

stages.name: Feature concatenation
stages.description: merge the aggregated NLP features and tabular technical indicators
stages.dejargonized_description: This stage merge the aggregated NLP features and tabular technical indicators.

inputs.name: feature_concatenation_input
inputs.constraints: Output from the previous pipeline stage or raw competition data for the first stage.

outputs.name: feature_concatenation_output
outputs.constraints: Artifact consumed by downstream stages in the solution pipeline.

preconditions: Upstream stage artifacts are available and aligned to the competition split.
guarantees: Produces the documented intermediate artifact for the next pipeline stage.

stages.name: Tree Modeling
stages.description: train LightGBM models. To prevent models from learning specific eras, train 10 separate models sequentially through time (Walk-Forward Validation) and average the result
stages.dejargonized_description: This stage train LightGBM models. To prevent models from learning specific eras, train 10 separate models sequentially through time (Walk-Forward Validation) and average the result.

inputs.name: tree_modeling_input
inputs.constraints: Output from the previous pipeline stage or raw competition data for the first stage.

outputs.name: solution_predictions
outputs.constraints: Final predictions or structured outputs for the competition metric.

preconditions: Upstream stage artifacts are available and aligned to the competition split.
guarantees: Produces the documented intermediate artifact for the next pipeline stage.

edges.provenance: News aggregation output is consumed by Market feature engineering.
Market feature engineering output is consumed by Future leak prevention.
Future leak prevention output is consumed by Feature concatenation.
Feature concatenation output is consumed by Tree Modeling.
